scenes.headline: Build a short in one pass
scenes.caption: Storyboard, Typecast narration, and Remotion render in one project.
scenes.narration: This starter connects a storyboard to Typecast narration and Remotion video.

scenes.headline: Typecast keeps narration in sync
scenes.caption: Generate audio from the same storyboard text and keep timing predictable.
scenes.narration: When the narration lives in the storyboard, the video timeline stays easy to control.

scenes.headline: Render the MP4 when you are ready
scenes.caption: Use the generated audio file in public/audio and export the final short.
scenes.narration: Generate the audio first, then render the mp4 from the same storyboard.
